title: Wooden Bread Bow Knife, Serrated Bread Bow Cutter, Stainless Steel Sourdough Bread Knife, Professional Bread Knife Cutter with Wooden Handle for Homemade Bread Sourdough Bagel Cake Fruit
features: 【High-Quality Stainless Steel Blade】The blade is forged from top-grade stainless steel, ensuring it remains rust-free and incredibly sharp. It effortlessly slices through bread without tearing or crushing, preserving the integrity and texture of your bread.
【Perfect Gift】This serrated bread knife makes an ideal gift for bakers and bakery lovers. It’s the perfect present for birthdays, holidays, housewarming parties, and other special occasions.

【Ergonomic Wooden Handle】This knife features a unique bowed design and a solid wood handle, designed with ergonomics in mind to provide an excellent grip, ensuring comfort and preventing hand fatigue. The robust construction ensures that it won't break under pressure.

【Easy Maintenance】To maintain the sharpness and longevity of the blade, simply wipe it clean with a damp cloth and dry it after each use. Although it is specially designed for right-handed use, the knife can be easily adapted for left-handed use. Just loosen two screws, flip the blade, and reinstall it to suit your preference.

【Versatile Usage】This bread knife is perfect for slicing homemade bread as well as other foods such as bagels, baguettes, cheese, fruits, and cakes. Its serrated edge ensures clean and precise cuts every time.
